zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Dixwell於1565年出生在英國瓦維其可爾福時，她的父親Humphrey Dixwell35歲，母親Ellen Lowe25歲。她於大約1583年與Edward Broughton在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1640年在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Dixwell于1565年出生在英国瓦維其可爾福时，她的父亲Humphrey Dixwell35岁，母亲Ellen Lowe25岁。她于大约1583年与Edward Broughton在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1640年在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dixwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

History: John Dixwell (c. 1607–1698/9), a regicide who signed Charles I's death warrant, fled from England to Hanau, Germany. From Hanau he migrated to New England, where he was first mentioned as being in America in 1664/5. The son of William Dixwell of Coton Hall, near Rugby, Warwickshire, John settled in New Haven, CT, where he assumed the name of James Davids.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Dixwell was born in 1565, in Churchover, Warwickshire, England, her father, Humphrey Dixwell, was 35 and her mother, Ellen Lowe, was 25. She married Edward Broughton about 1583, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1640, in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Dixwell est née en 1565, à Churchover, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Dixwell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ellen Lowe, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Broughton environ 1583, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1640, à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Dixwell 1565 in Churchover, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Dixwell 35 und ihre Mutter Ellen Lowe 25. Sie hat um 1583 in England Edward Broughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1640 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Dixwell è nata il nel 1565 nel Churchover, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Humphrey Dixwell, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ellen Lowe, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Edward Broughton circa 1583, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1640, nel Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Dixwellが1565年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチャーチオバーで生まれた時，父Humphrey Dixwellは35歳，母Ellen Loweは25歳であった。約1583年にイギリスでEdward Broughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1640年にイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Dixwell(이)가 1565년 영국 워윅실르 c후르초버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Dixwell(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Lowe(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1583년 영국에서 Edward Broughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1640년 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Dixwell nasceu em 1565, em Churchover, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Dixwell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Lowe, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Broughton aproximadamente 1583, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1640, em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Dixwell родилась в 1565 г. в местности чурчовир, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Dixwell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Lowe, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Broughton около 1583 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1640 г. в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Dixwell nació en 1565, en Churchover, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Dixwell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ellen Lowe, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Edward Broughton aproximadamente 1583, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1640, en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
